title: [MTR] DOCTOR YELLOW S1/S2
description: Doctor Yellow S1/S2 addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the Doctor Yellow S1 and S2 (925-0 and 925-10, based on the Class 962) diagnostic train to the game.

The train features interiors, pantographs and more!

By default, doors do not open at stations due to the nature of this train.

All seven cars are provided. Car n°5 is special with 3 bogies. It can be removed, as IRL it was inserted into the trainsets later on.

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

**[Check out the passenger version of this train (200 Series Shinkansen)!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-200-series-shinkansen)**

![DR YELLOW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e777b72c4bd33434427e87a158b18aca2aae72f.jpeg)
